description_long: This is a soft, fabric handbag with a rectangular body and a single, long shoulder strap. The exterior is primarily white with a pattern of small blue polka dots and some faint orange and blue markings, possibly from hand-drawn or printed designs. The bag features a flap closure on the front, secured by a button, and the flap is slightly wrinkled, indicating a flexible, cloth construction. The strap is attached at both ends of the bag and appears to be made from the same material as the body, with visible stitching. The overall appearance is casual and handmade, suitable for everyday use in urban environments. There are no visible brand logos or metallic hardware, and the bag has a soft, matte finish.
description: A soft, white fabric handbag with blue polka dots, a long shoulder strap, and a buttoned flap closure. The bag has a casual, handmade look with faint orange and blue markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the handbag and the length of the strap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the flap closure, button, and the main polka dot pattern with some orange markings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the bag's slimness and strap attachment.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel with blue polka dots and minimal markings.
attribute_strap_type: single long shoulder strap, non-adjustable, fabric, attached at both ends of the bag
attribute_closure_mechanism: buttoned flap closure on the front, with a visible button and overlapping fabric flap
attribute_pattern: blue polka dots with faint orange and blue hand-drawn or printed markings
